nasb.text: Open shame belongs to us, O Lord, to our kings, our princes and our fathers, because we have sinned against You.

esv.text: To us, O Lord, belongs open shame, to our kings, to our princes, and to our fathers, because we have sinned against you.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！我們和我們的君王、領袖、列祖，都滿面羞愧，因為我們得罪了你。

ccb.text: 主啊，我们和我们的君王、首领、先祖因得罪了你而满脸羞愧。
